name: RABBIT-CAGE-7
title: hard-rules spec and work-guide R6 reference deleted subagent-policy-injection feature path
description: R6 in hard-rules/docs/spec/spec.md and in .claude/work-guide.md states: 'The block is produced by .claude/features/subagent-policy-injection/scripts/policy-block.sh'. That feature and script path is obsolete — the canonical script is now .claude/features/contract/scripts/policy-block.sh. Any agent or human reading the rules will look at the wrong path. The actual dispatch mechanism (dispatch-feature-edit.sh) calls the correct contract script, but the documented rule is wrong.
